message:
feat(agent,tui): thread new Usage fields through ATIF and TUI

ATIF Step.Extra now includes cache_write_1h_tokens and
reasoning_tokens_estimated so eval logs preserve the full token
breakdown that upstream llm.Usage carries.

serf-tui's ASSISTANT_TEXT_END usage parser reads cache_write_1h_tokens
and includes it in the running context-token total so the status-line
count matches what the provider actually processed when extended-cache
is in use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
